utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, and total_budget. The final package includes all 7 items. Each is fully specified: destination (Prague, Czech Republic) is clear; travel_dates (2024-08-01 to 2024-08-05) are specific; transportation includes airline name, class, and total cost; accommodation includes property name, price per night, total cost, and currency; activities include selected activities, total cost, and currency; additional_services include dining details, cost, and dietary accommodations; total_budget includes full cost and currency. Therefore, all 7 out of 7 items are covered completely.
